prompt: A desktop wallpaper featuring a horizontal four-panel split layout with thick black borders. It showcases half-body portraits in a high-contrast woodcut printmaking style with thick black lines and cross-hatching, conveying a confident and elite mood. From left to right: Jack Ma against a textured orange background; Elon Musk in a suit against a textured red background; Mark Zuckerberg in a black shirt against a textured blue background; and Pony Ma wearing glasses and a suit against a textured green background. The subjects are rendered in monochromatic beige tones, contrasting sharply with the vibrant background of each pane.
